text.title: SSL/TLS Management: nginx Configuration
text.summary: nginx SSL parameters: TLS 1.2/1.3 only, ECDHE cipher suites, session cache (shared:SSL:10m), session tickets off (forward secrecy), OCSP stapling. Extract into snippets/ssl-params.conf and include in every server block.

rule.statement: Always add .well-known/acme-challenge exception to the HTTP→HTTPS redirect when using certbot.
rule.rationale: certbot's HTTP-01 challenge verifies domain ownership by placing a file at /.well-known/acme-challenge/. If nginx redirects all HTTP to HTTPS, certbot cannot complete the challenge and certificate renewal fails.

section.title: HSTS
section.p: Set HSTS with 2-year max-age. Add preload only after confirming all subdomains support HTTPS permanently.

see-also.link: Full site config with origin cert
